plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-546 RP17.P08.M06.S09-RP17.P09.M03.S10 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-546 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP17 p08 closeout p09 foundation: the P08 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the fourteen remaining rows), the full P08 Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P09 Scope Inventory, Contract Draft, and Type And Shape Definition cycles, and the P09 Primary Implementation Slice head (the first ten rows) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H17), Claude review packet (C17), and CP00-547 handoff, without opening AI governance, model policy, retrieval scope, or citation runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-546 is a descriptor-only RP17 AI-governance-core closeout pack (150 units, RP17.P08.M06.S09-RP17.P09.M03.S10, risk class C). Read-only inspection of implementation (registry.js, service.js, validators.js, index.js), tests (model.test.js), contract (ai-governance-core-contract.json), validator script, manifest, command-evidence, README, and review-hardening artifacts confirms the pack-level claim is honest and fully supported. The pack does NOT over-claim: manifest and command-evidence both report production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor; the only positive claim is production_ready_candidate gated on coverage.valid && slice.valid plus a '..._descriptor_verified' flag. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: every dispatches_*_runtime, writes_*, database, object-storage, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, loads_real_fixture_data, and exposes_raw_payload flag is false; no_real_data:true and writes_product_state:false, enforced in service.js freezeCp546Result, the contract no_write_attestation, and tests. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer (claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, allowed_claude_tools:[Read,Grep,Glob]); human final approval is preserved for the enterprise-trust claim. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packets (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, no product runtime execution). CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: forbidden_review_evidence covers auth-failure, zero-byte, malformed-JSON, fenced-JSON, tool-call-shaped, and missing-field blockers; readiness/auth preflight passed; validation-report shows no forbidden tools and read-tool source inspection. All 7 required public exports exist and are re-exported via index.js; the validator deep-equals contract<->registry for current_pack, requirements, and no_write_attestation; 3 dedicated CP546 tests assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries; and all deliverable (42/14/73/9/8/4), phase (100/50), micro-phase, and micro-title distributions reconcile exactly to 150. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, ldip-integration, workbook, docx) are correctly excluded from active_pack_implementation_refs. No P0-P3 findings. This PASS is an independent review signal only and does not constitute final approval; human approval remains required before any enterprise-trust or runtime-opening claim.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-546 ai governance core p08 closeout p09 foundation descriptor pack
